case_title: CARPENETI, RICHARD vs. RAYMOND H. LEVY, INC.

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARPENETI, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT RAYMOND H. LEVY, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAYMOND H. LEVY, INC. $9,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $3,133.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $285.00 INTEREST, $101.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,419.00
